summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of BIBI Cars CRM Calculator Engine module. All 14 tests passed successfully including pricing calculations, hidden fee logic, auction fee brackets, and quote creation.
passed_tests: GET /api/calculator/config/auction-fees/default-bg - Returns 9 auction fee bracket rules
GET /api/calculator/ports - Returns 4 ports and 4 vehicle types
Auction fee brackets: All 6 tested price ranges return correct fees
POST /api/calculator/quote - Successfully creates quotes with VIN and proper quote number format
